evaluation.notes: Four product lines on CFDs: Bootcamp (3-step, 6% per stage, 5% max loss tightening to 4% funded, 1:10 leverage, mandatory stop-loss within 3 minutes, 50% starting split), High Stakes (2-step, 8% then 5% targets, 10% max loss, 5% daily drawdown, 1:100 FX leverage, 80% starting split, 3 minimum profitable days of at least 0.5% each), and Hyper Growth (1-step, 10% target, 5% max loss tightening to 4% funded, 1:30 leverage, 50% starting split, account doubling through scaling). Separate Futures offering with Basecamp (one-time fee + activation fee on passing) and Rebate (higher one-time fee, no activation fee) plans at $25K and $50K sizes. Futures uses 6% eval target, 4% funded target, 3% max loss (EOD), 30% per-position consistency rule, and scales at every 10% profit milestone with 5% buying power increase and 1 mini / 10 micro contract increase each time up to $500,000. CFD accounts can scale up to $4M with 100% profit split and monthly salary ($4K at $350K, $10K at $500K). All trading takes place in a simulated environment — becoming funded is not guaranteed.

rules.notes: CFD programmes: Bootcamp (3-step, 1:10 leverage), High Stakes (2-step, 1:100 leverage), Hyper Growth (1-step, 1:30 leverage). Futures: Basecamp and Rebate plans. Bootcamp requires mandatory stop-loss within 3 minutes (max 2% risk per trade, 5 violations = termination). High Stakes prohibits orders 2 min before/after high-impact news. Bracket strategies around news prohibited on all CFD programs. News trading allowed on Futures. Copy trading restricted — allowed only on High Stakes and Hyper Growth with limitations, not between Bootcamp accounts, third-party copy trading not allowed. EAs allowed on CFDs but must not use arbitrage, tick scalping, emulators, or third-party signal copying; Bootcamp requires stop-loss compliance. Futures allows overnight holding up to 1 mini or 10 micro contracts, but all positions must be closed at least 10 minutes before market close. Futures per-position consistency rule: 30%. Inactivity: accounts closed after 30 days without new orders. Salary component: $4,000/month at $350K funding, $10,000/month at $500K. All trading takes place in a simulated environment.

markets.instruments: CFDs — FX, Metals, Indices, Crypto, Other Commodities; Futures
